data.title: Zelenskyy says ‘we must do everything’ against ‘wicked Russian attacks’ as Ukraine and US meet for emergency talks – live
data.description: Officials will discuss 28-point draft plan widely seen as favourable to Moscow, despite Russian invasion of Ukraine in February 2022There have been lots of conflicting reports about who wrote the 28-point plan to end the war in Ukraine, which is widely seen to favour Russia as it endorses some of Moscow’s key maximalist positions.A group of US senators say they were told by Marco Rubio that the plan is in fact not an American proposal and did not reflect Washington’s official position, claims heavily disputed by the US state department. Continue reading...

data.author: Elizabeth Morrison
data.title: Agentic AI: The Autonomous Force Redefining Work and Power Structures
data.description: Agentic AI evolves from chatbots to autonomous agents that plan, act, and adapt, poised to automate workflows and disrupt jobs across industries. Microsoft and Amazon lead with platforms promising trillions in value, but ethical and workforce challenges loom large.
